Final response excerpt:
Analytics is wired and verified — the `vercel-analytics` element + `/_vercel/insights` script are in the build, **27 tests still pass**, and the privacy policy was updated truthfully (it now discloses cookieless analytics instead of falsely claiming "no analytics"). 

**One manual step on your side:** flip on Web Analytics in the Vercel dashboard (Project → Analytics → Enable). The script is inert until you do — and nothing flows until then, which is also why there's no data to wait on.

This effectively **completes Phase 0** (truthful About ✅, privacy/terms ✅, analytics ✅) — which is exactly the gate the strategist said had to clear before any marketing. So your question is well-timed: the push is now unblocked.
